commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0feadce2b3ab3a7c0651e3d8b81fac042eb59cbf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds model-specific fal Krea 2 image-generation payload schemas, forwards fal provider options through `image_generate`, documents Krea Medium/Large usage, and adds focused provider/tool/live-test coverage.

PR surface: Source +283, Tests +393, Docs +87. Total +763 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. The changed behavior is supported by source review, upstream fal schema inspection, focused tests listed in the PR body, and redacted live fal API proof for the Krea Medium path.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining merge decision is maintainer acceptance of the public SDK/tool option surface; the docs mismatch is narrow but not the main blocker.

target.title: feat: add Fal Krea image model schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a Fal image model payload registry so Krea 2 uses native `aspect_ratio`, `creativity`, and `image_style_references` instead of Flux-style `image_size` / edit endpoint payloads.
- Register canonical Fal Krea 2 Medium/Large refs and keep Nano Banana/GPT/Flux payload behavior model-specific.
- Add generic Fal provider options at the image tool layer, docs for Krea Medium/Large, and live-test handling for Krea style references.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/fal/image-generation-provider.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts test/image-generation.runtime.live.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (104 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/fal/image-generation-provider.test.ts src/agents/tools/image-generate-tool.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (105 tests passed after final Krea outputFormat guard)
- `pnpm check:docs`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm build`
- `FAL_KEY=<redacted from 1Password> OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_PROVIDERS=fal OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_MODELS='fal/krea/v2/medium/text-to-image' OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_CASES='fal:generate,fal:edit' OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 pnpm test:live test/image-generation.runtime.live.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (generate/edit passed)
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=0 pnpm check:changed`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean)

Testbox note: `pnpm check:changed` delegated runs `tbx_01ksrkzeabhkns0029mbz0wbhg` and `tbx_01ksrm1ce8rk16nmj4h4rvh3x9` failed before checks with `fatal: origin/main...HEAD: no merge base`; the same changed lanes passed locally with Testbox delegation disabled.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Fal Krea 2 Medium/Large now use model-specific payload schemas, including canonical `fal/krea/v2/...` refs, style references, native aspect ratio, creativity, and unsupported override rejection.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout plus live Fal API with FAL_KEY read from 1Password and redacted in logs.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_PROVIDERS=fal OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_MODELS='fal/krea/v2/medium/text-to-image' OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_CASES='fal:generate,fal:edit' OPENCLAW_LIVE_IMAGE_GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 pnpm test:live test/image-generation.runtime.live.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.
Evidence after fix: Live output reported `fal:generate:krea/v2/medium/text-to-image` and `fal:edit:krea/v2/medium/text-to-image`, skipped none, failures none.
Observed result after fix: Both live generate and style-reference edit returned image buffers.
What was not tested: Live Krea Large and live Nano Banana were not run; their payload behavior is covered by focused provider tests.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
